# Awesome Agent Orchestration Platforms

> A curated collection of the best AI agent orchestration frameworks, multi-agent systems, and autonomous agent tools for the 2026 LLM ecosystem.

## Core Frameworks
- [LangGraph](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph): Stateful, graph-based agent orchestration.
- [CrewAI](https://github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI): Role-based multi-agent collaboration.
- [Claude Agent SDK](https://github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-python): Native Anthropic SDK with MCP support.
- [AutoGen 2.0 (AG2)](https://github.com/ag2ai/ag2): Asynchronous conversational agents.

## Trending Standards
- [Model Context Protocol (MCP)](https://modelcontextprotocol.io): Open standard for tool/data integration.
- [Pydantic AI](https://ai.pydantic.dev): Type-safe agent development.

## Documentation
- [README.md](/README.md): Main repository landing page.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](/CONTRIBUTING.md): Guidelines for adding new tools.
